category_sources: source_facts.description says Befunge-93 is an esoteric programming language.
display_name_sources: Official Cat's Eye Technologies page names the language Befunge-93.
Official repository README is titled Welcome to the Befunge-93 Reference Distribution.
docs_sources: Official Cat's Eye Technologies language page documents Befunge-93 and links to the reference distribution.
Official repository README points to the specification in the doc directory.
repo_sources: Official Cat's Eye Technologies language page links to Browse files for Befunge-93.
Official git.catseye.tc repository page shows git clone https://git.catseye.tc/Befunge-93/.
tags_sources: Official Cat's Eye Technologies page describes Befunge-93 as stack-based, two-dimensional, and self-modifying.
source_facts.description identifies an esoteric programming language.
